login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your editorial workspace.
login.taglineSubtitle: An AI-native editorial platform for structured, citation-worthy publishing. Every story, every voice — in motion.

webhook.title: Publishing webhook
webhook.description: Configure a webhook so published posts are automatically pushed to your website. Your site needs an endpoint that accepts POST requests with the post content.
webhook.autoPublishDescription: When enabled, posts will be pushed to your website immediately when the admin clicks publish.
webhook.autoPublishOn: Posts are pushed to your website immediately on publish
webhook.autoPublishOff: Admin will be asked to confirm before pushing to your website
webhook.noWebhookConfigured: No publish webhook has been configured for your account yet. Contact your manager to set it up.

domain.title: Set up your workspace
domain.subtitle: Enter the domain of the website you want to manage content for.
domain.label: Your website domain
domain.hint: Enter just the domain, without https://
domain.errorDomainTaken: This domain is already linked to another account. Please contact support if you believe this is a mistake.

google.title: Connect your Google account
google.subtitle: Grant access to Google Analytics and Search Console so we can track performance and optimise your content.
google.scopeAnalytics: Google Analytics — read your traffic data
google.scopeSearch: Google Search Console — track rankings and indexing
google.privacyNote: We only request read access. You can revoke access at any time.

oauthError.access_denied: You denied access. Please try again.
oauthError.invalid_state: The request expired or was invalid. Please try again.
oauthError.token_exchange: Could not complete the connection. Please try again.
oauthError.db_error: Connection succeeded but could not be saved. Please contact support.
oauthError.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

admin.title: Admin
admin.dashboardWelcome: Welcome to the admin dashboard. Use the sidebar to manage content.
admin.author: Author
admin.title: Title

postsPage.noPosts: No posts yet. Create one to get started.

usersPage.title: User accounts
usersPage.subtitle: Create and manage client accounts. Users cannot create accounts themselves.
usersPage.emptyHint: Create the first client account above.
usersPage.confirmDelete: Delete account for {email}? This cannot be undone.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.adminSubtitle: You're viewing all posts from all users.
dashboard.adminSectionDescription: You have admin rights. Use the links below to manage content and settings.
dashboard.userSectionDescription: You're signed in. Here are some useful links.
dashboard.postsAutoCreated: Posts will be created automatically by the system.
dashboard.author: Author
dashboard.confirmDelete: Delete post "{slug}"? This cannot be undone.

errors.noSession: Sign-in succeeded but no session was created. Try again.
errors.networkError: Network error. Check that NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY are set for this environment.

checklist.credibility: At least 1 external citation or expert quote
